_meta.description: This file contains the main introduction about the portfolio owner who is offering his services. It includes the professional intro paragraph, outro paragraph, a personal quote and credentials that showcase and establish their credibility in the field

fields.intro_para: Main professional introduction paragraph - summarizes career goals, skills, and work ethic
fields.outer_para: Closing paragraph with call to action for collaboration
fields.my_quote: Personal quote that reflects the owner's mindset
fields.credentials: Strong credible pointers about the owner's work that build trust

about.intro_para: As a Software Engineer, I am highly skilled in architecting systems and designing platforms end-to-end that are optimised to scale. I am proficient in engineering softwares that measurably improve business outcomes. I am very passionate in mind field which helps me easily adopt a growth mindset and willingness to learn anything that makes me better in my field. I have a proven track record of working as an individual contributor and as a team collaborator. My codebases are always readable, modular, well-documented and up-to-date.
about.outer_para: I am always eager to collaborate on solving problems and contributing to the growth of a cause. Feel free to contact me via LinkedIn or email.
about.my_quote: Lets hope for the best and plan for the worst
